watchlist.tooltip: Add the ticker symbols you want to follow. Use the symbol exactly as it appears on Yahoo Finance (e.g. AAPL, MSFT, SPY, BRK-B). The display name is optional and only used as a label.

show-symbol-in-panel.description: Show the ticker symbol in the panel
show-symbol-in-panel.tooltip: When on, the panel shows e.g. 'AAPL 195.12 ▲0.74%'. When off, just the price and change.

rotation-interval.description: Seconds each ticker is shown before rotating
rotation-interval.tooltip: Set to a high value if you only track one symbol, or if you prefer it not to rotate quickly.

refresh-interval.description: How often to fetch fresh prices
refresh-interval.tooltip: Lower values update more often but make more requests to Yahoo Finance. 60 seconds is a sensible default.

chart-range.description: Time range for the mini charts in the popup

show-charts.description: Show a mini chart for each stock in the popup

debug-logging.tooltip: Writes detailed auth and fetch traces to the system log (Looking Glass / ~/.xsession-errors). Only needed when diagnosing data problems.
